name: Israeli Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and halve the cucumbers lengthwise. Remove seeds and center pulp.
2. Dice the cucumber flesh and measure out 2 cups.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except lemon juice.
4. Add the vegetable oil and lemon juice to the mixture.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Toss until well mixed and serve immediately.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE CHO: 7g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 3g; CAL: 51 (Low-sodium diets). Omit salt if desired.
